description: Small-batch crisp, sweet apple gummies with a jewel-soft bite, slow-poured like artisan pâte de fruit and dusted with a delicate sugar sparkle for that perfect candy-shop finish. It blends CBC to round out the full-plant entourage effect, CBD to keep things calm and balanced, and THC for a classic euphoric lift in a 10:10:1 ratio. Made to help you relax and find your calm.
